Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s

details.note: message was not in cache — only fields in raw_data available

before.content:
## Best Controller Warm Up Routine

**🎯 Aim Edit Piece Control & 1v1 Freebuild [`5112-1759-8096`]**

Aim:
- Barrier Jump
  - Right-hand peek every shot.
  - Focus on pre-aiming the head before jumping or moving.

- 360 Bounce + 360 Tracking

- SMG Tracking (Prefer to use AR)
  - Start with easy then Normal then Hard

- Bounce Tracking
  - Track while bots jump.
  - Do NOT flick, smooth follow only.

- Sniper / AR Tracking
  - Long range only.
  - Focus on recoil control and staying on target after first tag.

- Note: Play 5 minutes for each

after.content:
## Best Aim Warm Up Routine

**🎯 Aim Edit Piece Control & 1v1 Freebuild [`5112-1759-8096`]**

Aim:
- Barrier Jump
  - Right-hand peek every shot.
  - Focus on pre-aiming the head before jumping or moving.

- 360 Bounce + 360 Tracking

- SMG Tracking (Prefer to use AR)
  - Start with easy then Normal then Hard

- Bounce Tracking
  - Track while bots jump.
  - Do NOT flick, smooth follow only.

- Sniper / AR Tracking
  - Long range only.
  - Focus on recoil control and staying on target after first tag.

- Note: Play 5 minutes for each

🟢 **All Systems Operational**

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

before.content:
## Best Aim Warm Up Routine

**🎯 Aim Edit Piece Control & 1v1 Freebuild [`5112-1759-8096`]**

Aim:
- Barrier Jump
  - Right-hand peek every shot.
  - Focus on pre-aiming the head before jumping or moving.

- 360 Bounce + 360 Tracking

- SMG Tracking (Prefer to use AR)
  - Start with easy then Normal then Hard

- Bounce Tracking
  - Track while bots jump.
  - Do NOT flick, smooth follow only.

- Sniper / AR Tracking
  - Long range only.
  - Focus on recoil control and staying on target after first tag.

- Note: Play 5 minutes for each

after.content:
## Best Aim Routine

**🎯 Aim Edit Piece Control & 1v1 Freebuild [`5112-1759-8096`]**

- Barrier Jump
  - Right-hand peek every shot.
  - Focus on pre-aiming the head before jumping or moving.

- 360 Bounce + 360 Tracking

- SMG Tracking (Prefer to use AR)
  - Start with easy then Normal then Hard

- Bounce Tracking
  - Track while bots jump.
  - Do NOT flick, smooth follow only.

- Sniper / AR Tracking
  - Long range only.
  - Focus on recoil control and staying on target after first tag.

- Note: Play 5 minutes for each
